title: Buttery Crusty Semolina Crumble
description: A low-calorie-friendly show-off Filipino dish featuring semolina flour, boiled until tender and served with a buttery, crispy topping.
instructions: In a large pot, combine semolina and water. Stir to prevent clumping.

Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring occasionally until the mixture thickens slightly (about 10 minutes). Reduce heat to low and simmer for an additional 3-5 minutes or until desired consistency is reached.
While the semolina simmers, in a small bowl, mix together butter, brown sugar, and vanilla extract. Set aside.
Once the semolina has thickened, remove from heat and stir in flour. Let cool slightly before spreading the mixture over the hot semolina evenly.
Return to low heat if needed for even distribution of crumble topping. Cook for an additional 3-5 minutes or until golden brown on top (be careful not to burn).
Transfer the warm butternut semolina to a serving dish and let it cool slightly before serving.
